inProgress.title: Free Developer CLI — LLM Comparison from Terminal

recentWork.title: Usage Metering & Free Tier Enforcement
recentWork.summary: Added usage enforcement middleware to tRPC: usageEnforcedProcedure (tracks API calls, enforces 100/day free limit, 10K pro, 50K team), requireProProcedure, requireTeamProcedure. Reads tier from subscription table, records calls in usage_tracking, returns 429 with upgrade CTA. Not yet wired to routers.

recentWork.title: feat: trust score tRPC router enhancements (#43)
recentWork.summary: Rebased on main (was already up to date, no conflicts). All CI checks pass: Build, ESLint, Security Audit, TypeScript Check, Vercel. Ready for merge.

recentWork.title: Fixed 4 blockers + 2 additional fixes
recentWork.summary: Fixed auth bypass, rate limiting, zod validation, migration tables. Additional: changed costUsd from integer to bigint to prevent overflow, created missing trust-scores-client.tsx component with tRPC router for trust score data display

nextSteps: Wire usageEnforcedProcedure to API routers (models, trust-scores, etc.)
Build usage dashboard component showing quota vs. consumption
PR #118 is green and ready for Salomé to merge
